title: Cyberforged
description: Welcome to Cyberforged! This mod aims to add a new challenge through a dangerous dimension for players who are bored with the base game.
body:
Welcome to Cyberforged! This mod aims to add a new challenge for players who are bored with the base game. The Orexium dimension is a dangerous metallic dimension that is very high risk to enter, but the rewards are very great. 



REQUIRES TERRABLENDER API


Currently I have added a new custom dimension containing many powerful robotic mobs. Be careful, as when you enter the dimension, the only way to get out is to kill the powerful exo golem. Defeat Robotic pigs and Sheep, gather materials, explore a new tech dimension, craft unique energy based weapons and escape with newfound power!
